title: Neu Wav
content:
Neu Wav

Time frame: Christmas to Valentine’s Day
Places: car, Monet Room at the MOMA, beach, rest stop - the characters keep showing up at the same locations time and time again, cyclically, trying to break through the cycle and get to somewhere new.

Flashbacks, forwards, and sideways

Jove and Juno - Pyramus and Thisbe - Pygmalion paired with Arachne - Theseus and Ariadne

Different families kept them apart, similarity of brother/sister kept them apart - he sleeps with a man while his wife is away on Christmas break and awaits the results of an std test

They’re both artists and both famous via social media - they both have patrons or master’s who they answer to

Write down my generational family history

Research family history from myth


Pygmalion - bachelor for a long time, timid, unable to connect with others, crafts a marble statue and treats it like his wife, he gives it gifts and sneaks it kisses, and on the celebration day of Venus, he wishes for a girl like his ivory girl to be born and Venus grants this wish (9 months later they give birth to a son who goes on to have his own son who has an incestuous relationship).
